cases.prompt: Commercial retail or service properties in Skagit County assessed over one million dollars.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.assessed_value
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (
  TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 510 AND 590
  OR TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 610 AND 691
) AND ps.assessed_value >= 1000000
cases.title: Commercial Retail or Service Properties in Skagit County Assessed Over $1,000,000
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with land use codes in the commercial retail or service range (510-590 and 610-691) and assessed value greater than or equal to 1,000,000 in Skagit County.

cases.prompt: Private bare recreation lots with valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parcel_number,
    ps.land_use,
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) AS land_use_code,
    ps.improvement_building_count,
    ps.has_geometry,
    LOWER(COALESCE(ps.owner_name, '')) AS owner_name_lower,
    LOWER(COALESCE(ps.situs_address, '')) AS situs_address_lower
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
  WHERE ps.has_geometry = TRUE
    AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
),
excluded AS (
  SELECT parcel_number FROM base
  WHERE
    -- Exclude condos and moorage
    land_use_code IN (140, 500, 970)
    OR
    -- Exclude public/civic uses by land use code range 670 (government), 680 (schools), 710-790 (parks, cemeteries, churches)
    land_use_code = 670 OR land_use_code = 680 OR (land_use_code BETWEEN 710 AND 790)
    OR
    -- Exclude mobile/manufactured leased or occupied codes
    land_use_code IN (181, 182, 185)
    OR
    -- Exclude by owner name or situs address keywords indicating public or civic use
    owner_name_lower LIKE '%school%' OR owner_name_lower LIKE '%cemetery%' OR owner_name_lower LIKE '%church%' OR owner_name_lower LIKE '%moorage%' OR owner_name_lower LIKE '%park%'
    OR situs_address_lower LIKE '%school%' OR situs_address_lower LIKE '%cemetery%' OR situs_address_lower LIKE '%church%' OR situs_address_lower LIKE '%moorage%' OR situs_address_lower LIKE '%park%'
)
SELECT
  base.parcel_number,
  base.land_use,
  base.land_use_code,
  base.improvement_building_count,
  base.has_geometry
FROM base
WHERE base.parcel_number NOT IN (SELECT parcel_number FROM excluded)
cases.title: Private Bare Recreation Lots with Valid Geometry Excluding Public and Condo Uses
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels classified as bare or recreation land with no improvements, valid map geometry, excluding public parks, schools, cemeteries, churches, moorage, and condos. Exclude parcels with mobile/manufactured leased or occupied codes and public/civic uses by owner name, situs address, and land use.

cases.prompt: Commercial retail or service properties countywide assessed over $500,000.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.assessed_value
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE
  (
    TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 510 AND 590
    OR TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 610 AND 691
  )
  AND ps.assessed_value >= 500000
cases.title: Commercial Retail or Service Properties Countywide Assessed Over $500,000
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels with land use codes in the commercial retail or service range (510-590 and 610-691) and assessed value greater than or equal to $500,000, countywide without city or floodplain restrictions.

cases.prompt: Public park parcels countywide, not private bare recreation lots.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.improvement_building_count, ps.has_geometry
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE
  TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 710 AND 790
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
  AND TRY_CAST(ps.acres AS DOUBLE) > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(ps.land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) NOT IN (181, 182, 185, 140, 500, 970)
cases.title: Public Park Parcels Countywide, Excluding Private Bare Recreation Lots
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels with land use codes indicating public/civic uses such as parks, cemeteries, churches, or other public assembly uses (DOR codes 710-790), excluding private bare recreation lots (no improvements, no mobile home leased or condo/common-area parcels, no zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and excluding residential dwelling evidence).
